_comment: Illustrative baseline mean scores for the reference-free online evaluators, captured on known-good HR-agent traffic. The monitor alerts when a live metric falls more than `tolerance` below its baseline. NOTE: the LLM-judge metrics (groundedness, professional_tone) wobble run-to-run, especially on a small sample — that noise is why `tolerance` exists and why you average over many traces. Recapture against YOUR traffic after an intentional, reviewed change with:  python module_7_production_ci/monitor.py --write-baseline --limit 200
